Class NewBooking

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.NewBooking
public class NewBooking extends Object
Screen Controller for the New Booking screen Lets the user add a new booking and save it to the database
Version:
4.0 April 7 2025
Author:
Neil Daya
